title: Believe It
excerpt: I am brave, fearless, bold & strong. Sometimes it's good to remind ourselves of this fact. I was in Canada over the weekend and someone requested this quote so that she could make it into a dashboard for her planner!…
body:
I am brave, fearless, bold & strong. Sometimes it's good to remind ourselves of this fact. I was in Canada over the weekend and someone requested this quote so that she could make it into a dashboard for her planner!

If you have any favorite quotes - please share them in the comments below. I'm using this watercolor set from Michaels and a waterbrush that I love by Tim Holtz/Ranger.
